subject: [RFC v2 02/21] mm: thp: propagate split failure from vma_adjust_trans_huge()

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the proposed change, suggesting that it might not be safe to move vma_adjust_trans_huge() earlier in the callers. Proposed an alternative solution.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series proposes changes to the Transparent Huge Pages (THP) functionality in the Linux kernel. The main goal is to propagate split failure from vma_adjust_trans_huge() to prevent huge PMD straddling at VMA boundaries. This is achieved by moving the vma_adjust_trans_huge() call earlier in three callers (__split_vma, vma_shrink, commit_merge) to allow for clean -ENOMEM returns in case of allocation failures.
